text: Dead ReLU neurons. When x is negative, ReLU outputs zero.
The red zone is dead. Any input here produces zero output.
At x equals negative two, output is zero.
The gradient is zero for negatives, one for positives.
Zero gradient kills the signal during backpropagation.
Weight update uses gradient times upstream. If gradient is zero, update is zero.
New weight equals old weight. Nothing changes.
ReLU dies when x is negative. Gradient zero. No updates.
